Full Text Translate for Zotero is a Zotero plugin that converts PDF papers into readable HTML while preserving images and figures, then translates the parsed full text for better academic reading.
A Zotero 7 plugin that minimizes Zotero to the system tray instead of closing it completely. Keep your reference manager running quietly in the background without cluttering your taskbar.

Zotero插件-AiNote
A plugin for Zotero. Perform operations to execute custom commands.
Generate Zotero tags with an LLM from item abstracts and the first page of attached PDFs.
A Zotero plugin that automatically retrieves and updates paper metadata from multiple academic sources based on paper titles.
a ODH wrapper for Zotero
Zotero plugin to center a PDF in the view when navigating between pages.
A Zotero 8 plugin that automatically generates hierarchical PDF bookmarks (outlines/table of contents) using Google's Gemini AI.
A Zotero plugin for AI-assisted literature extraction
Turns your Zotero library into a living timeline of reading, publishing, and scholarly progress.
Simple plugin for limiting maximum number of open tabs in Zotero.
一个用于将 Zotero 中的注释同步到墨墨背单词的云词本中的插件
A Zotero plugin that hunts down missing DOIs and abstracts for your references
Easily see how many annotations your Zotero items have
Pin items in your collections in Zotero so they always appear at the top.
A Zotero plugin that extends Zotero's local API with additional functionality.
Give your AI assistant superpowers for Zotero plugin development. 25 tools for screenshots, DOM inspection, JavaScript execution, build integration, and debugging via Model Context Protocol.
用于 Zotero 8 的插件：获取 arXiv 论文在幻觉翻译上的译文 PDF，并把原文 PDF 与译文 PDF 以分屏方式并排打开。  Fetch HJFY translations for arXiv papers and open the source PDF and translation side by side in Zotero 8.
Zotero 插件，用于显示文献的 CCF (中国计算机学会) 会议和期刊等级。
Automatically feed literature from journal RSS based on keywords
基于LLM的批量文档搜索、总结，简单易用。支持在zotero中选择指定文档，然后使用LLM进行相同论文的批量查询或合并查询，摆脱论文相关的体力劳动工作（比如论文摘要、GPU算力检查等）
AI semantic search for Zotero 7 & 8. Find papers by meaning, not just keywords. 100% local and private.
Collection for Zotero：用 LLM根据「标题 + 摘要」为条目智能推荐 Zotero 分类，并提供可审核的确认对话框。
A Zotero plugin that enlarges hover citation previews, lets you resize them on the fly, and keeps reference details clear and legible.
Zotero plugin for note management. Helping you visualize your notes and annotations efficiently.
Zotero AI Assistant
A Zotero plugin that provides the PolarRec service within the Zotero UI.
AI inside Zotero 8
Import papers from OpenReview workshops and venues directly into Zotero.
Zotero Replication Checker Plugin (privacy-first local matching to FLoRA)
免费GPT流量，专为中国宝宝研制的Zotero插件。A pluign for Zotero Chinese users.
Convert PDFs to Zotero notes with one click
A plugin to organise your reference collections into ordered syllabi.
Zotero插件，全文翻译（支持MinerU，pdf2zh，dox2x）。AI智能文献总结，AI列文献矩阵。7天免费试用。
开放的学术交流与知识共享平台。研学并进，智慧共享 | Open academic exchange and knowledge sharing platform. Where Research Meets Community
A plugin for summarizing and indexing annotations in Zotero
A Zotero 8 plugin that automatically highlights user-defined keywords in the PDF reader.
A lightweight Zotero plugin , only for setting your PDF view as defaults. Such as hand tool, scroll mode, and zoom mode.
Gemini Zotero 将 Gemini-3（尤其强大的视觉理解与生成能力）深度集成到 Zotero  中，为你的科研阅读与管理全面提速。它不仅能快速解析 PDF、与论文内容对话并提炼关键信息，还能把文本与图表信息转化为直观的“视觉洞察”——自动生成流程图、结构图与各类示意图。配合可自定义的模板与自动化笔记记录机制，让学术阅读从静态浏览升级为更动态、更高效的研究工作流。
Use categorial tags to better manage tags.
A powerful mindmap plugin for zotero.  一个强大的 zotero 思维导图插件
Marginalia 是一个为 Zotero 设计的 AI 聊天插件，让你能够与论文进行智能对话，快速理解和分析学术文献。
Nutstore sso plugin for Zotero
Tab Enhance is a Zotero plugin that adds more convenient features to Zotero tabs.
A global-ish command that opens a Quick Launch bar in Zotero.
This Zotero addon provides statics of authors and simplifies viewing items of designated author in a Zotero library.
Zotero plugin that eliminates the tedious task of adding the book information separately when adding a chapter from the RI OPAC.
Science Live Platform - Transform research into connected knowledge

A Zotero plugin to highlight variables in PDF
好看又好用的AI工具栏！A beautiful and handful AI tool bar plugin for Zotero.
Chat with AI in Zotero

This is a tool used to generate a review based on the relevant literature provided by users.

Zotero plugin for quick access to paper CCF rating, conference/journal, and citation count.
Status monitoring and analysis tool for Zotero.
A plugin for Zotero to automatically retrieve citation, official code link, conference, related papers and so on.
Plugin for zotero to retrieve reference data from Semantic Scholar API and add them to your library
KeepZotero is a zotero plugin to keep zotero in taskbar by changing close to minimize

A Zotero plugin that seamlessly integrates with Eagle, allowing you to save PDF image annotations directly to your Eagle library for better visual content management.

Plugin that tallies citation counts for Zotero items.

It's a plugin extension in Zotero.  Zotero MCP Plugin enables integration between AI assistants and Zotero through MCP. Zotero MCP Plugin 是一个 Zotero 插件，通过 MCP协议实现 AI 助手与 Zotero深度集成。插件支持文献检索、元   数据管理、全文分析和智能问答等功能，让 Claude、ChatGPT 等 AI 工具能够直接访问和操作您的文献库。
A simple Zotero plugin that brings your own LLM into the side panel.
Keep track of whether you've read items in Zotero
A Zotero plugin to remove the broken & duplicate attachment link of the bibliography
Cita: a Wikidata addon for Zotero with citations metadata support

ZotCard is a plug-in for Zotero, which is a card note-taking enhancement tool. It provides card templates (such as concept card, character card, golden sentence card, etc., by default, you can customize other card templates), so you can write cards quickly. In addition, it helps you sort cards and standardize card formats.
Chart in Zotero
Remove attachment(s) when delete the item(s) or collection in Zotero and JurisM.
一个基于 PDFFigure2 的 PDF 图表解析插件

See how your saved papers are cited. Supporting, contrasting, and mentioning counts appear directly in your Zotero library.

Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.

A plugin that does one thing only: Detect and manage duplicate items in Zotero.
